titleStmt.title: SII 19.370: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 370. (A.R. No. 312 of 1910.) TIRUMEYJÑĀNAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, JÑĀNAPARAMĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The details of the date correspond to A.D. 985 August 10 in the reign of Uttama-Chōḷa. The inscription is damaged and the portion at the end is lost. It records the sale of a land tax-free to the temple of Chandraśēkhara-Perumāḷ at Tirumiyānam to provide for offerings to that god by the peruṅguṟi-mahāsabhā inclusive of the nambis of Nālūr a brahmadēya in Śēṟṟūr-kūṟṟam, to whose possession the land is stated to have lapsed by the non-payment of the taxes due on the same by the originai owners, and who had been consequently paying the taxes for many years to several kings. The sabhā held its meeting in the inner courtyard (śattimuṟṟam) of the Śambarēśvara temple at Nālūr for transacting this sale.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecariparmmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 patiṉaiñcāvatu ceṟṟūrkkūṟṟat
tu brahmateyam nālūr nampiy yāruḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟipperumakka
ḷom Ivvāṇṭu ciṅkanāyaṟṟut tiṅkaḷkkiḻamaip peṟṟa kārttikaiynāṉṟu Ivvūr śampa reśvarattu catti
muṟṟattey kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟṟuk kūṭiyiruntu paṇippaṇiyāṟ paṇittu Ivvūrt cirumi yāṉattuc cantiracekara
perumāḷiṭai kācu koṇṭu Ittevarkkut tiruvamirtuppuṟamākac cantirātittaval Iṟaiyili yākap paṇippaṇiyāl paṇit
tuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr māṭilaṉ pāṇṭaṉ ṟattaṉum tampimāruṅ kaṭampaṉ paṇṭaṉum tampiyum taṅkaḷ nilattu Iṟai Iṟāta
māka Innilattukkup palyāṇṭum sabhaiyomey Iṟai Iṟuttu sabhainokkip palarā [jāk]kaḷukku Iṟai Iṟuttup pon
ta nilam Ivvūr vaṭaceri meṭupārttiyuñ ceṟuvupārttiyumāṉa pārttic cantiracekarap perumāḷukku nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyiliyākak
koṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilattukkellai Ūraṟin=ta na kellaiyiṉu[ kku]
kiḻpāṟkellai tirukka śvarattup perumāḷ ṉilattukku meṟkum
lai māṭilaṉ catti civa paṭṭālaka nilattukkuṅ kiṭaṅka
l pāṟkellai tirunā tiru ttap peru māṇilattukku
ṟ kellai sabhaiyo nilattukkut tiruccittira kūṭattup perumā ttukkut
kum Ivvicaitta nāṉkellaiyilumakappaṭṭa pārtti karut mā
ṭiya pārttiyuṅ ki ṉāl vanta pātti Āyirattirunūṟṟu pārttium Un=ta
śamum Uḷḷaṭaṅka Ita y puḻutikkāvum t teṟkil kiṭaṅkuc ca
tiṉukku meṟkkaṭainta I kkup puḻutikkāvu kiṭaṅkupārtti Itaṉi
kiṇaṟum Uḷpaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koṇṭa kamu ta raṇa
m meṭu pārtti viṟṟu ttom cantirace ḷḷiṭṭa peru
teṟkku perumakkaḷom I ttu vaṭakkil niyā tumuḻamaka
nila kkel nirpāykiṉ
Digital edition of SII 19.370 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
